notes:
- "Auto turn on runner" reworked: the checkbox is now tied to this app. Checked = the runner turns on automatically when the app opens and connects to your project. Unchecked = the runner starts off when the app opens, and nothing runs until you turn it on yourself - leftover state from a previous session can no longer boot the runner armed, and the Runner button no longer shows ON before it's true. The checkbox also acts immediately: ticking it turns the runner on, unticking turns it off.
- Fixed the checkbox silently not saving: it showed as ticked while its confirmation warning was still open, so abandoning that warning (closing the app / UEFN auto-close) left it looking on all session but unsaved. The box now only ticks once you confirm, and the Activity feed logs "ON (saved)" so you know it stuck.

App-only update: no "Update Bridge Payload" step this time.
